name: Pumpkin Pie Cognac
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat together the half-and-half, milk, brown sugar, cinnamon, cloves, eggs, and cognac in a mixing bowl.
3. Stir in the pureed pumpkin and candied ginger.
4. Pour the filling into the pie shell.
5. Bake for 40-to-50 minutes in the middle of the oven until the filling is set and the center of the pie barely moves when shaken.
